description: Perfect for those casual outings, these leatherite sandals from gas are all that you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort. Upper Leatherite adjustable straps with a cut out design for durability and style Midsole Leatherite midsole for enhanced durability and comfort Outsole TPR outsole with an elevated heel for maxium grip shoe care Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
